name: Incident clustering eval fixture
description: Mixed-difficulty incident clustering: varied cluster sizes, ambiguous near-miss singletons, vague tickets, and cross-topic distractors.

tickets.subject: Billing page won't load
tickets.body: When I click on the billing tab in workspace settings, the page spins forever and never loads. I need to update our payment method before renewal.

tickets.subject: OAuth callback just redirects me in circles
tickets.body: The GitHub connect flow is looping. I see the authorize page, grant access, then land back at the start. No error message, just a loop.

tickets.subject: Team commands not showing up
tickets.body: Some of our shared workflows disappeared from Warp Drive this morning. I can still see my personal commands but anything shared by the team is gone.

tickets.subject: Slack notifications delayed by over an hour
tickets.body: Our Warp alert webhook to Slack is delayed today. The incident notification eventually posted but it was around 40 minutes after the event.

tickets.subject: App crashes on startup after update
tickets.body: Warp will not stay open after the update. The dock icon bounces, a window flashes, then the app quits without an error dialog.

tickets.subject: Warp AI giving wrong answers
tickets.body: The AI assistant in Warp suggested a command that deleted my node_modules and broke my project. The suggestion was completely wrong for what I asked.

tickets.subject: New Okta users get 403
tickets.body: We provisioned three new engineers through Okta SCIM but Warp returns a 403 when they try to sign in through SSO.

tickets.subject: Sync spinner stuck for hours
tickets.body: Warp Drive has been stuck syncing for over an hour on my MacBook. New notebooks and workflows from the team do not appear locally.

tickets.subject: Feature request: better diff viewer
tickets.body: Would love an inline diff viewer in Warp for reviewing git changes without leaving the terminal. Not urgent, just a suggestion.

tickets.subject: GitHub integration stuck in a loop
tickets.body: When I click Connect GitHub from Warp Drive, the GitHub authorization page appears, I approve it, and then Warp drops me back on the same login screen. I have tried Chrome and Safari.

tickets.subject: Terminal window disappears immediately
tickets.body: The terminal window appears and disappears immediately every time I launch Warp. Reinstalling did not fix it.

tickets.subject: Need copy of our renewal contract
tickets.body: Can you send us a copy of the signed renewal contract for our procurement archive?

tickets.subject: Webhook lag for Slack alerts
tickets.body: Slack notifications from Warp are lagging badly. The webhook test succeeds but real alerts arrive much later than expected.

tickets.subject: Invoice missing our VAT number
tickets.body: Please reissue our March invoice with our company VAT number and billing address. This is only for our finance records.

tickets.subject: SCIM users can't log in after provisioning
tickets.body: Okta says SCIM provisioning completed, but the users are not present in the Warp workspace and receive access denied on login.

tickets.subject: GitHub connect callback not working
tickets.body: Several developers in our workspace cannot link GitHub today. The OAuth callback appears to succeed but Warp never records the connection.

tickets.subject: Delete my account and all data
tickets.body: I want to permanently delete my Warp account and all personal data associated with my email address under GDPR.

tickets.subject: Getting duplicate alerts in Slack
tickets.body: We received three copies of the same Warp incident alert in our #ops channel. This started today and only affects the Slack webhook.

tickets.subject: Warp AI sometimes ignores context
tickets.body: When I have a long terminal session, Warp AI seems to lose track of earlier commands and gives suggestions that contradict what I already did.

tickets.subject: Warp crashes instantly after latest update
tickets.body: After installing the latest Warp update, the app opens a blank terminal window and crashes within two seconds. macOS crash report mentions the renderer.

tickets.subject: Can I transfer my license to a colleague?
tickets.body: I'm leaving the company and would like to transfer my Warp Pro seat to another team member rather than cancelling. Is that possible?

tickets.subject: Shared snippets vanished after update
tickets.body: Since the latest macOS client update, team snippets are missing from Warp Drive. Restarting the app and signing out did not refresh them.

tickets.subject: Crash report points to GPU renderer
tickets.body: My Warp client crashes at startup. The Apple crash report includes GPU process and renderer initialization frames.

tickets.subject: Settings not syncing across machines
tickets.body: My Warp theme and keybindings are different on my work laptop vs my home machine. I thought these were supposed to sync through Warp Drive?

tickets.subject: Duplicate Slack messages from webhook
tickets.body: Every automation alert from Warp is posting twice in Slack. The duplicated messages have the same payload and timestamp range.

tickets.subject: SAML login failing for new hires
tickets.body: People newly assigned to the Warp app in Okta hit a 403 page after SAML login. Removing and re-adding the assignment did not help.

tickets.subject: Can't finish GitHub integration
tickets.body: Our team is trying to enable the GitHub integration. After approving the OAuth app, the callback returns to Warp but the integration still says not connected.

tickets.subject: Shared command library outdated
tickets.body: My shared command library is stale. I can see the latest entries on another machine, but this Mac keeps showing last week's Warp Drive contents.

tickets.subject: How do I export Warp settings?
tickets.body: Where do I export my keyboard shortcuts and theme settings so I can move them to a new laptop?

tickets.subject: Warp Drive commands stopped syncing
tickets.body: After updating Warp this morning, my shared Warp Drive commands no longer sync. The sidebar spinner never finishes and teammates can see commands that I cannot.

expected_clusters.summary: GitHub OAuth authorization redirects users back to the login screen instead of completing account linking.
Warp Drive sync stalls after update, leaving shared commands and snippets missing or outdated.
Slack webhook notifications are delayed or delivered multiple times.
SSO/SCIM provisioning through Okta fails with 403, preventing new users from accessing Warp.
Warp terminal crashes on launch after an update, tied to GPU renderer initialization.
Customer reports settings not syncing across machines via Warp Drive.
Customer requests GDPR account and data deletion.
Customer asks how to export Warp settings.
Customer requests a copy of their renewal contract.
Customer asks about transferring their license to a colleague.
Customer requests an inline diff viewer feature.
Customer requests invoice reissue with VAT number.
Customer reports billing settings page not loading.
Customer reports Warp AI suggesting a destructive command.
Customer reports Warp AI losing context in long sessions.

evaluation_notes.primary_metric: pairwise clustering precision/recall/F1 over ticket_id pairs
evaluation_notes.negative_pairs: tickets with different expected_incident_id values, including singleton tickets
evaluation_notes.singleton_policy: singleton tickets should remain alone unless a future fixture intentionally links them to an incident
evaluation_notes.difficulty_notes: Varied cluster sizes (3-5 tickets), near-miss singletons (T-021 looks like sync incident but is settings sync; T-014 is billing UI not billing admin; T-029/T-030 are both AI issues but different problems), mixed channels, ambiguous wording in some tickets
